---
title: 'Heritage Family Fellowship - Anaheim, CA'
date: '2012-05-24T04:55:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Church Finder'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '739664532570551226'
blogger_filename: '/2012/05/heritage-family-fellowship.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Church Finder/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'California'
---

Heritage Family Fellowship<br />
Founded in 1978 by Pastor Art and JoAnn Aragon&nbsp;
<br />
<br />
<a href="http://heritagefamilyfellowship.net/about.html">http://heritagefamilyfellowship.net/about.html</a>
<br />
<br />
1140 N. Tustin Street, Orange, CA 92867
<br />
<br />
Heritage Family Fellowship has a 3-fold Mission Statement: To propagate the Word of Faith, To build strong families, To remove fear from accomplishing what God has instructed you to do.
